channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Iran Postpones State Funeral Of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei To Late June

media:content.media:description: Khamenei's funeral would take place between June 26 and July 5 (File)

item.description: Iran had earlier said it planned to hold the three-day event in early Muharram, the first month of the Islamic calendar, which would have put in early June.
item.content:encoded: Iran had earlier said it planned to hold the three-day event in early Muharram, the first month of the Islamic calendar, which would have put in early June.

item.title: Microsoft Restricts Staff's Use Of Claude Fable 5 Over Data Concerns: Report

media:content.media:description: The concerns center on customer data and confidential information

item.description: Claude Fable 5 is the most powerful model Anthropic has made available for wider use, with the company citing its performance in software engineering and analytics.
item.content:encoded: Claude Fable 5 is the most powerful model Anthropic has made available for wider use, with the company citing its performance in software engineering and analytics.

item.title: Iran Adds Elon Musk's SpaceX, Starlink To Target List In Middle East: Report

media:content.media:description: During the Russia-Ukraine conflict, Starlink helped Ukrainian forces stay online

item.description: Tehran believes Starlink technology and other Musk-link projects have been used to support US-Israel military operations in the region.
item.content:encoded: Tehran believes Starlink technology and other Musk-link projects have been used to support US-Israel military operations in the region.

item.title: 'Do It When Suits Them, Don't When It Doesn't': S Jaishankar On US Tariffs

media:content.media:description: Jaishanker also slammed the moral ambiguity of European nations

item.description: India became a major buyer of Russian oil after the US imposed sanctions on Russia in 2022 for invading Ukraine and capped the price of its oil.
item.content:encoded: India became a major buyer of Russian oil after the US imposed sanctions on Russia in 2022 for invading Ukraine and capped the price of its oil.

item.title: US-Iran War Live: Trump Cancels Iran Strikes After 'High-Level Approval' Of Talks
item.description: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.
item.content:encoded: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.

item.title: US Imposes Sanctions On Cuba State Oil Company Amid Energy Crisis

media:content.media:description: Cuba is struggling under a decades-old embargo and a lack of petroleum

item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio asserted that key assets of the company, known as Cupet, were "unlawfully expropriated from American owners years ago."
item.content:encoded: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio asserted that key assets of the company, known as Cupet, were "unlawfully expropriated from American owners years ago."

item.title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha Dies At 47, Three Years After Sudden Collapse

media:content.media:description: She had been in hospital since falling ill suddenly in December 2022

item.description: She was suffering from an abdominal infection and "her condition continued to worsen", the Bureau of the Royal Household said in a statement, until she "passed away peacefully" on Thursday evening.
item.content:encoded: She was suffering from an abdominal infection and "her condition continued to worsen", the Bureau of the Royal Household said in a statement, until she "passed away peacefully" on Thursday evening.

item.title: Opening Of Canada-US Gordie Howe Bridge Delayed Amid Unresolved Issues

media:content.media:description: The bridge is jointly owned by Canada and Michigan and was expected to open to traffic later this month

item.description: The 1.5-mile-long (2.4-kilometer-long) Gordie Howe International Bridge spans the Detroit River and connects the Motor City with Windsor, Ontario.
item.content:encoded: The 1.5-mile-long (2.4-kilometer-long) Gordie Howe International Bridge spans the Detroit River and connects the Motor City with Windsor, Ontario.

item.title: Iran Says 'Text Not Final' After Trump Claims Khamenei Approved Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: Tehranand Washington have been swapping proposals to end the war

item.description: Trump said his understanding was that the Iranian Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, had given his approval to the proposal.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1111975/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Trump said his understanding was that the Iranian Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, had given his approval to the proposal.

item.title: Appeals Court Says US Government Can Keep Collecting 10% Tariffs For Now

media:content.media:description: The court said that Trump government can continue collecting 10% worldwide tariff it imposed in February.

item.description: The Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit in Washington decision handed a procedural win to the Trump administration, concluding that its case was "likely to succeed on the merits.''
item.content:encoded: The Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit in Washington decision handed a procedural win to the Trump administration, concluding that its case was "likely to succeed on the merits.''

item.title: US-Iran War Highlights: Iranian Officer Says Renewed War With US 'Inevitable' Amid Trump's Peace Push
item.description: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal
item.content:encoded: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal

item.title: US-Iran War Highlights: Trump Announces "Great Settlement" With Iran, Deal To Be Signed In Europe In Few Days
item.description: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:

item.title: "State Piracy": Iran Condemns US Attack On Ship That Killed 3 Indian Sailors

media:content.media:description: Three Indian sailors were died after a vessel was attacked by US forces off the coast of Oman.

item.description: Iran said that the brutal US attacks on Indian commercial vessels which have killed at least three Indian nationals, stand as clear evidence of America's ongoing policy of armed robbery and State piracy.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1111940/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Iran said that the brutal US attacks on Indian commercial vessels which have killed at least three Indian nationals, stand as clear evidence of America's ongoing policy of armed robbery and State piracy.

item.title: Iran Has Not Yet Approved Any Deal With US: Report

media:content.media:description: There has been no official comment from Iran on a possible deal with the United States.

item.description: Iran War: US President Donald Trump had earlier said he had called off planned strikes on Iran and flagged the signing of a possible deal with Tehran.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1111975/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Iran War: US President Donald Trump had earlier said he had called off planned strikes on Iran and flagged the signing of a possible deal with Tehran.

item.title: US Iran War Highlights: US Says It Is Striking Iran In Response To Helicopter Shootdown

media:content.media:description: West Asia War, US-Iran-Israel War Live Updates

item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.

item.title: Trump Says He Believes Iran's Supreme Leader Has Approved Deal With US

media:content.media:description: Trump described the deal as "a very strong memorandum of understanding".

item.description: Iran War: US President Donald Trump on Thursday said he believed Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei had approved a deal with the US that would trigger the opening of the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1111974/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Iran War: US President Donald Trump on Thursday said he believed Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei had approved a deal with the US that would trigger the opening of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: "Made Great Settlement Of War With Iran, Could Sign This Weekend": Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump said the deal resolved the issue of Iran pursuing the development of a nuclear weapon.

item.description: "Made Great Settlement Of War With Iran, Could Sign This Weekend": Trump
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1111974/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>"Made Great Settlement Of War With Iran, Could Sign This Weekend": Trump

item.title: Hamas Co-Founder's Son Says Father Released By Israel After 2 Year Detention

media:content.media:description: Yousef had been held in Israeli administrative detention since October 2023 (File)

item.description: The son of a Hamas co-founder said that Israeli authorities released his father in the occupied West Bank on Thursday after holding him without trial for more than two years.
item.content:encoded: The son of a Hamas co-founder said that Israeli authorities released his father in the occupied West Bank on Thursday after holding him without trial for more than two years.

item.title: Drug Shortages, Financial Crisis: Palestine Warns Of Health System Collapse

media:content.media:description: 180 of the 520 essential medicines required by public health facilities have completely run out of stock

item.description: In a press statement released June 11, the embassy said the Palestinian health sector is facing an "unprecedented humanitarian crisis" that threatens the lives of patients across the occupied Palestinian territories.
item.content:encoded: In a press statement released June 11, the embassy said the Palestinian health sector is facing an "unprecedented humanitarian crisis" that threatens the lives of patients across the occupied Palestinian territories.

item.title: Trump Names Prosecutor Jay Clayton New US Intelligence Chief

media:content.media:description: Clayton is a US attorney for the Southern District of New York

item.description: US President Donald Trump on Thursday named prosecutor Jay Clayton as his new intelligence chief, after a backlash from Republicans over his bid to install an inexperienced ally in the post.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Thursday named prosecutor Jay Clayton as his new intelligence chief, after a backlash from Republicans over his bid to install an inexperienced ally in the post.
